title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Google India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
